# Payment API reference

> Flitt payment API Reference.

## Home page. Explore the methods to integrate Flitt

- [Home](https://docs.flitt.com/index.md)

## API Reference

- [direct](https://docs.flitt.com/api/applepay-direct/index.md)

- [on web](https://docs.flitt.com/api/applepay-web/index.md)

- [Callbacks](https://docs.flitt.com/api/callbacks/index.md)
